Function.Inference: A |: appears at the end of bar 5, marking the end of the intro.
A :| appears at the end of bar 33, enclosing the infinite loop body.

Section.Inference: Introductory bars leading into the main loop.
Introduces the first texture with sustained chords over an ostinato bass.
Contrasting texture with offbeat staccato chords and a 4-bar melodic transition.
Key changes to C major, introducing a bouncy melody and walking bassline.
